title: Thai Beef Fillet with Fluffy Sauce
description: A flavorful and spicy Thai dish featuring tender beef fillet in a fluffy and savory sauce.
instructions: 2. Season the beef fillet with salt and pepper.
3. Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in an oven-safe pan over medium-high heat.
4. Sear the beef fillet for 1-2 minutes on each side.
5. Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and cook for 12-15 minutes.
6. In a separate pan, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
7. Add the grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
8. Stir in the red curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes.
9. Add the coconut milk, fish sauce, and chicken broth.
10. Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes.
11. Slice the cooked beef fillet into thin strips.
12. Serve the beef with the fluffy sauce spooned over the top.
